message:
✨ Show per-cluster progress bars in Missions card

- Progress bar always visible (green for orbit, red for abort, blue
  during deploy) instead of hidden after completion
- Per-cluster breakdown with replica counts and status bars auto-shows
  for active missions (no expand click needed)
- Completed missions keep compact view; expand to see per-cluster detail
- Deploy events show "No recent events" for completed missions when
  K8s events have expired

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
